about.name: Swapnil Mane
about.summary: 5+ years of software engineering experience delivering production-ready solutions, building web/mobile applications, LLM inference, model training, and agentic AI workflows
about.tagline: I work fast, build from scratch, and ship production-ready AI solutions.
about.description: Welcome to my digital corner. I am thrilled to showcase my projects, as well as provide insights into my educational journey and professional endeavors. Let's connect and explore opportunities together.

education.institution: Binghamton University (SUNY), Thomas J. Watson College of Engineering and Applied Science
education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
coursework: Design and Analysis of Computer Algorithms

education.institution: Fr. C. Rodrigues Institute of Technology (Mumbai University)
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering

bullets: Delivered critical product and infrastructure milestones across Android, iOS, macOS, backend, Windows, and LLM inference
Rebuilt and stabilized the Android app, unblocking Google/Facebook authentication by fixing parameter-passing failures and production crash paths
Improved the Java backend upgrading auth and account flows (email validation, password checks/policies, secure password reset requiring prior credential verification)
Led a cross-platform UI development, redesigning and rebuilding ~60% of UI to enhance user experience
Designed and shipped a Rust microservice for LLM inference, reducing response latency and enabling horizontal workload distribution across contributor devices
Improved inference reliability by adding task cancellation and zombie-task cleanup to protect cluster health and keep Rust workers responsive under sustained load with the 99% availability
Built token tracking + LLMOps foundations for monetization, implementing chat-history–driven accounting of input/output tokens, per-model inference usage, and cost attribution
Introduced PR-based code review standards (review checklist + ownership-based approvals) that reduced bug regressions by ~30%
Implemented silent push notification–driven background task automation across Android and backend services to ensure critical background jobs run reliably
Took ownership of the Windows application and contributor client, restoring login flows and unlocking GPU contribution so Windows users can reliably provide and monetize compute
Established CI/CD pipelines to automate builds, versioning, and deployments, improving release predictability and long-term maintainability
Led technical planning and work allocation for the team, mapping Android, backend, and Windows deliverables to engineer strengths to hit sprint timelines
Resolved state-management failures in AutoGen multi-agent workflows by standardizing AWS S3 data serialization, ensuring reliable cross-agent handoffs for LLM execution
Streamlined the AI infrastructure by migrating from redundant Vertex AI to dedicated AWS GPU endpoints, reducing monthly cloud expenses by $16,000 and saving 5+ hours of weekly troubleshooting

Conducted technical due diligence to realign cloud strategy and established production-grade backend services, transforming experimental features into stable, reliable infrastructure for an enterprise launch
Founding architect of the AI/ML Digital Team; led product development and trained new recruits

Reduced feature extraction time by 95% for battery State of Health (SOH) analysis by engineering a PySpark pipeline to ingest and batch-process 18M+ records; applied physics-based feature extraction (capacity estimation, open-circuit voltage profiling) for real-time SOH estimation and reduced execution runtime by ~60%
Trained hybrid LSTM-DNN models for predictive battery health forecasting, achieving 5.7% MAE in capacity prediction and estimated remaining useful life to enable highly accurate failure detection
Deployed regression model on battery state-of-health (including individual cell data) to predict repurposing with 90% accuracy
Tuned Spark job configurations and parallelized data transformations; ensured low-latency integration with cloud and scaling for SaaS platform
Developed interactive Tableau dashboards using Python to visualize battery analytics and automate report generation, enabling scalability for the Series A launch
Solution facilitated predictive maintenance scheduling, near-future failure analysis, and battery repurposing strategies; drove business growth and key MoUs

experience.organization: LTIMindtree Ltd. (formerly Larsen & Toubro Infotech Ltd.)
bullets: Trained an NLP pipeline in Azure ML Studio for 900K+ IT tickets using word embedding and TF-IDF vectorization
Resolved severe class imbalance through stratified sampling, SMOTE oversampling, and class-weighted Logistic Regression & Random Forest models, driving 66% accuracy on a highly skewed dataset
Engineered real-time inference via Azure ML endpoint with RLHF to align model outputs and boost generalization
Ingested raw ticket data into Azure Data Lake Storage and Microsoft SQL Server; orchestrated preprocessing and model training in Azure Machine Learning Studio
Deployed inference pipeline as an Azure ML endpoint for real-time integration with the ticketing web application; reduced manual ticket routing and MTTR
Programmed a Python/Tkinter lookup tool with OpenCV, Tesseract OCR & MS Excel, cutting search time by 67%
Developed and optimized SAP ABAP programs using AMDP, CDS views, and SELECT optimizations; implemented User Exits, BADIs, and Enhancements

Earned GoMx Individual Excellence Award for two automation solutions: .NET-based VB script for SAP NetWeaver monitoring (reduced manual monitoring time per system by 86%, from 35 to 5 minutes; 90% annual monitoring effort saved) and Python GUI-based user search with OCR and Excel (67% search time reduction)

Enhanced data integration and batch automation via BAPIs and Module Pool programming; used SAP debugging tools (SQL Trace ST05, Runtime Analysis SAT, ABAP Debugger); managed Transport Requests in Agile (DEV to QA to PRD); collaborated with SAP Functional Consultants (MM, SD, FI); provided training and knowledge-transfer documentation
Taught basics of Python and game development through interactive small projects and object-oriented programming with real-world examples
Implemented multi-utility app development on Human Machine Interface (HMI)
Developed games and managed peripheral device communication via Tkinter and PySerial in Python
Deployed code to embedded systems (Arduino, Raspberry Pi, STM32) for real-time data acquisition

projects.name: GitLeet
projects.description: Serverless browser extension that syncs accepted LeetCode submissions (question metadata, solution, performance) to a user's GitHub repository. Writes to solutions/<problem-slug>/ with solution files and README; supports optional MCP schema endpoint and auto-push on Accepted.

projects.name: ATS Engine
projects.description: Model-agnostic Applicant Tracking System engine with deterministic LaTeX parsing, strict rubric scoring, evidence mapping, and pluggable LLM models. Supports local and enhanced modes with Zod schemas for JD normalization, bullet classification, and fit explanation.

projects.name: Multi-agent LLM text-to-SQL
projects.description: Developed an autonomous multi-agent system using the AutoGen framework and Ollama LLMs with 60% execution accuracy to translate natural language into optimized SQL queries, validating the inference logic with Bird.dev dataset.

projects.name: Portfolio ChatBot
projects.description: Deployed a full-stack RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) chatbot using Node.js/Express, React, OpenRouter and Google AI Studio for interactive portfolio Q&A, delivering 95.8% precision, 95.4% F1 score, and 3.2s average latency.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Dynamic digital resume with skills, experience, projects and live demos; includes integrated RAG chatbot (Node/Express backend, React frontend).

projects.name: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Prototyped a movie recommender using TF-IDF and SBERT with Python, leveraging feature engineering on 45,000 records from the Kaggle Movies Dataset to increase semantic similarity precision in top-K results.

projects.name: Battery State of Health Prediction
projects.description: Led the development of a battery State of Health (SOH) prediction system, focusing on estimating Remaining Useful Life (RUL) for efficient lifecycle management. AI models achieved over 90% accuracy, utilizing advanced machine learning techniques to categorize batteries and model their degradation over time. Optimized Python code for handling over 3.25 million data points using parallel processing and multithreading.

projects.name: Computer Vision: Edge detection, Feature Matching, AR, Video tracking
projects.description: Computer vision algorithms for edge detection and feature matching (Gaussian filters, Sobel, Hough transform, FAST-BRIEF); 3D pose estimation and video tracking (epipolar geometry, triangulation, Lucas-Kanade, inverse compositional alignment) for AR integration.

projects.name: Data Mining: Dimensionality Reduction, Classification and Clustering
projects.description: This project implements several techniques for image classification and clustering. The methods used include Principal Component Analysis (PCA), Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), Deep Neural Networks (DNN), and K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN). The primary goal is to enhance data representation, improve classification accuracy, and optimize clustering outcomes.

projects.name: Ticket Classification System
projects.description: The Ticket Classification System streamlines ticket management by automatically categorizing incoming support requests based on historical data. Built using Azure ML Studio, the model employs TF-IDF for text vectorization and regression techniques for supervised learning on skewed data. When a new ticket is generated, the system calculates a similarity score by comparing it with previously classified tickets, ensuring accurate categorization. Azure's cloud-based infrastructure ensures scalability, improving issue resolution times and customer satisfaction.

projects.name: Optimized Course Assignment System
projects.description: Java program that assigns courses considering graduation criteria and prerequisites; State pattern for degree requirements; wait-list and graduation eligibility.

projects.name: Thought to Text Conversion Using Deep Learning
projects.description: Classified EEG signals from raw brainwave data (frontal and temporal lobes); MATLAB and Python for processing; supervised model for thought-to-text; 59% accuracy under predefined test conditions. Research paper.

projects.name: Simple Handwritten Text Recognition using Neural Network
projects.description: Handwritten digit recognition using MNIST dataset with a three-layered neural network (input, hidden, output). Preprocesses data from the MNIST dataset, rescales it, and trains the neural network using backpropagation and regularization techniques.

projects.name: Bidirectional Counter for Attendance Record using IoT
projects.description: Attendance tracking app for businesses, associations and schools to track employees, members and students; check-in, check-out and access control for administrators with smartphones and tablets.

projects.name: Automatic Mains Failure System for Diesel Generators
projects.description: Vital component for uninterrupted power supply during electrical outages. Converts high 3-phase voltage to manageable 3 volts. An Arduino UNO board seamlessly switches from primary mains to backup power, guaranteeing smooth transition and uninterrupted power flow. Used in industries, data centers, and critical infrastructure.

certifications.name: Microsoft Technology Associate - Introduction to Programming using Python

leadership.organization: Training & Placement Office, Fr. C. RIT, Vashi

achievements.title: GoMx Individual Excellence Award
achievements.description: For developing automation tools that enhanced operational efficiency and productivity by over 85%. SAP NetWeaver monitoring script (.NET) reduced manual time per system by ~86% (35 to 5 minutes), saving ~90% of annual monitoring effort (~900 minutes). Python GUI-based user search with OCR and Excel reduced search time by 67%. Demonstrated ability to identify inefficiencies and implement solutions with tangible time and resource savings.
metrics: 86% reduction in monitoring time per system

achievements.title: Team collaboration and delivery
achievements.description: Played a pivotal role as SAP ABAP developer in agile project delivering project codes and implementing new system within strict deadline. Collaborated with functional consultant, developers, project lead, project manager, and client; allocated tasks efficiently; timely deployment significantly enhanced operational efficiency and exceeded client expectations. Highlighted teamwork, communication, and adaptability in achieving shared goals.

journeyDisplay.introHtml:
I have 5+ years of software engineering experience delivering production-ready solutions—building web and mobile applications, LLM inference, model training, and agentic AI workflows.


I hold a Master of Science in Computer Science from Binghamton University (GPA 3.71/4.0) and a B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication from Fr. C. Rodrigues Institute of Technology, Mumbai University. My path has taken me from full-stack and backend development into ML engineering, LLM systems, and scalable data pipelines, shipping production software that has improved cost, accuracy, and time-to-resolution.


That growth from building apps and APIs to designing agentic AI, LLM inference, and predictive models has kept me consistent with my goal of building robust, scalable systems and bringing research-grade AI into production. I focus on shipping solutions that drive real impact.

narrative: Swapnil Tukaram Mane has 5+ years of software engineering experience delivering production-ready solutions: web and mobile applications, LLM inference, model training, and agentic AI workflows. Education: MS Computer Science from Binghamton University (GPA 3.71/4.0), B.E. Electronics and Telecommunication from Fr. C. Rodrigues Institute of Technology, Mumbai University. Experience: Asearis Data Systems (Software Engineer, Rust LLM microservice, multiplatform client modernization 60%, 99% availability, token tracking and LLMOps), Sitewiz (AI Engineer, AutoGen multi-agent, AWS S3 serialization, Vertex AI to AWS GPU migration $16k/month savings), Bridge Green Upcycle Corp (Software Engineering Intern, PySpark 18M+ records, battery SOH 95% feature extraction reduction, LSTM-DNN 5.7% MAE, Tableau, Series A), LTIMindtree (Software Engineer Aug 2020–Jul 2023, Azure ML NLP 900K tickets, 66% accuracy, RLHF, Python/Tkinter OpenCV Tesseract 67% search time reduction), CueMath (Python and Game Development Teacher), Navavidha Techsolutions (Junior App Developer, IoT, Arduino). Projects: GitLeet (browser extension LeetCode to GitHub sync), ATS Engine (model-agnostic ATS, LaTeX parsing, LLM), multi-agent Text-to-SQL (Ollama, AutoGen), Portfolio RAG chatbot (Node/Express, OpenRouter, Google AI Studio), Movie Recommendation (TF-IDF, SBERT), thought-to-text (EEG, 59% accuracy). Tagline: I work fast, build from scratch, and ship production-ready AI solutions.
